description_long: This chest of drawers features a rectangular, boxy form with a natural wood finish and a visibly textured surface resembling rough-cut timber. The front face displays three evenly spaced drawers, each equipped with two small, round wooden knob handles. The top surface is flat and smooth, suitable for placing items such as lamps, books, or decorative objects. The sides and back are plain, with the same wood grain texture continuing around the entire piece. The construction appears solid and robust, typical of furniture designed for storage in homes, garages, or urban interiors. There are no visible locks, branding, or decorative embellishments beyond the wood grain.
description: A rectangular, wood-textured chest of drawers with three drawers and round wooden knobs. The surface is rough and natural, with a flat top for additional storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing three drawers with round wooden knobs and a textured wood grain surface.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the plain, textured wood grain side panel and the depth of the chest.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a flat, unadorned wood-textured back panel with no handles or drawers.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the plain, textured wood grain side and the depth of the chest.
